title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IDP Education India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IDP Education India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IDP Education India International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About IDP Education India International Enterprises:
IDP Education India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India International Enterprises!
